mapper.sql: id, avatar, parent_id AS parentId, username, password, phone_number AS phoneNumber, salt, name, status, balance, creat_time AS creatTime, update_time AS updateTime, wx_union_id AS wxUnionId, wx_open_id AS wxOpenId, huanxin_user_name AS huanxinUserName, huanxin_password AS huanxinPassword, merchants_name AS merchantsName, service_sorce AS serviceSorce, effciency_score AS effciencyScore, score, lat, lng, address, type, business_start AS businessStart, business_end AS businessEnd, announcement, state, reason, merchants_phone AS merchantsPhone, lable_id AS lableId, merchants_level AS merchantsLevel, province, city, county
mapper.select:
SELECT id merchantsCode, merchants_name merchantsName, score score, lat lat, lng lng, address address, type type FROM app_b_user WHERE county =#{city} AND state = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT id merchantsCode, `name` merchantsName, score, lat, lng, address, CONCAT('7') type FROM app_up_merchants where adcode =#{city} and brand is not null

SELECT id merchantsCode, merchants_name merchantsName, score score, lat lat, lng lng, address address, type type FROM app_b_user WHERE city =#{city} AND state = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT id merchantsCode, `name` merchantsName, score, lat, lng, address, CONCAT('7') type FROM app_up_merchants where citycode =#{city} and brand is not null

SELECT a.id merchantsCode, merchants_name merchantsName, score score, lat lat, lng lng, address address, type type FROM app_b_user AS a LEFT JOIN app_merchants_brand AS b ON b.user_b_id = a.id WHERE city =#{city} AND a.state = 1 AND type = 2 AND b.brand_id = #{brand}

SELECT id merchantsCode, merchants_name merchantsName, score score, lat lat, lng lng, address address, type type FROM app_b_user WHERE city =#{city} AND state = 1 AND lable_id like "%"#{lable,jdbcType=VARCHAR}"%"

SELECT id merchantsCode, merchants_name merchantsName, score score, lat lat, lng lng, address address, type type FROM app_b_user WHERE city =#{city} AND state = 1 AND merchants_level IS NOT NULL ORDER BY merchants_level

SELECT a.id merchantsCode, merchants_name merchantsName, score score, lat lat, lng lng, address address, type type FROM app_b_user AS a LEFT JOIN app_merchants_brand AS b ON b.user_b_id = a.id WHERE city =#{city} AND a.state = 1 AND type = 2 AND b.brand_id = #{brand} AND lable_id like "%"#{lable,jdbcType=VARCHAR}"%"

SELECT a.id merchantsCode, merchants_name merchantsName, score score, lat lat, lng lng, address address, type type FROM app_b_user AS a LEFT JOIN app_merchants_brand AS b ON b.user_b_id = a.id WHERE city =#{city} AND a.state = 1 AND type = 2 AND b.brand_id = #{brand} AND merchants_level IS NOT NULL ORDER BY merchants_level

SELECT id merchantsCode, merchants_name merchantsName, score score, lat lat, lng lng, address address, type type FROM app_b_user WHERE city =#{city} AND state = 1 AND type = 2 AND lable_id like "%"#{lable,jdbcType=VARCHAR}"%"

SELECT id, merchants_name merchantsName, score score, lat lat, lng lng, address address, type type FROM app_b_user WHERE city =#{city} AND state = 1 AND type = 2 AND merchants_level IS NOT NULL ORDER BY merchants_level

SELECT a.id merchantsCode, merchants_name merchantsName, score score, lat lat, lng lng, address address, type type FROM app_b_user AS a LEFT JOIN app_merchants_brand AS b ON b.user_b_id = a.id WHERE city =#{city} AND a.state = 1 AND (type = 1 OR type = 3) AND b.brand_id = #{brand} AND lable_id like "%"#{lable,jdbcType=VARCHAR}"%"

SELECT a.id merchantsCode, merchants_name merchantsName, score score, lat lat, lng lng, address address, type type FROM app_b_user AS a LEFT JOIN app_merchants_brand AS b ON b.user_b_id = a.id WHERE city =#{city} AND a.state = 1 AND (type = 1 OR type = 3) AND b.brand_id = #{brand} AND merchants_level IS NOT NULL ORDER BY merchants_level

SELECT id merchantsCode, merchants_name merchantsName, score score, lat lat, lng lng, address address, type type FROM app_b_user WHERE city =#{city} AND state = 1 AND (type = 1 OR type = 3) AND lable_id like "%"#{lable,jdbcType=VARCHAR}"%"

SELECT id merchantsCode, merchants_name merchantsName, score score, lat lat, lng lng, address address, type type FROM app_b_user WHERE city =#{city} AND state = 1 AND (type = 1 OR type = 3) AND merchants_level IS NOT NULL ORDER BY merchants_level

SELECT id merchantsCode, merchants_name merchantsName, service_sorce serviceSorce, effciency_score effciencyScore, score score, huanxin_user_name huanxinUserName, lat lat, lng lng, address address, merchants_phone merchantsPhone, type type FROM app_b_user WHERE id = #{merchantsCode}
SELECT id merchantsCode, merchants_name merchantsName, lat lat, lng lng, address address, lable_id lableid FROM app_b_user WHERE id = #{merchantsId}

SELECT id merchantsCode, merchants_name merchantsName, score score, lat lat, lng lng, address address, type type, state state FROM app_b_user WHERE merchants_level is NOT NULL AND city = #{city} AND state = 1 ORDER BY merchants_level
SELECT merchants_lable FROM app_merchants_details_lable WHERE id = #{s}

SELECT a.id userBId,a.merchants_name merchantsName,a.type,a.score,a.address,a.lng,a.lat,b.url FROM app_b_user as a LEFT JOIN app_merchants_info_banner as b ON a.id = b.user_b_id WHERE a.id = #{userid} AND b.`index` = 1

SELECT a.id userBId,b.url url,a.merchants_name merchantsName,a.score,a.address,a.lng,a.lat,a.merchants_phone phoneNumber,a.huanxin_user_name huanxinUserName,c.start_time startTime,c.end_time endTime FROM app_b_user as a LEFT JOIN app_merchants_info_banner as b ON a.id = b.user_b_id LEFT JOIN app_b_user_config as c ON c.user_b_id = a.id WHERE a.id = #{userBId} AND b.`index` = 1
SELECT * FROM app_b_user WHERE id = #{userBId} FOR UPDATE;

SELECT id merchantsCode, merchants_name merchantsName, score score, lat lat, lng lng, address address, type type, state state FROM app_b_user WHERE city = #{city} AND state = 1 AND type = 1 limit #{pagesize},10
SELECT id FROM app_b_user WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT brand_id FROM app_merchants_brand WHERE user_b_id = #{s} AND state = 1
